use_cases: Primary action buttons in dark-themed SaaS dashboards and fintech applications
Icon-trigger buttons with glass morphism styling and gradient shine effects
Interactive CTA elements with hover scale, rotation, and glow animations
Decorative action buttons for modern media and creator platforms
Multi-variant styled buttons supporting default, green, indigo, and red themes
ai_summary: A polished glass-morphism button component featuring backdrop blur, gradient backgrounds, and animated shine effects. Supports four color variants (default, green, indigo, red) with hover interactions including scale, rotation, and shadow glow transitions. Built with accessibility in mind using aria-labels and smooth CSS transitions. Designed for dark-themed interfaces requiring premium, modern button styling.
